Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Nimbus Quantum Logistics Private Limited by Aurora Bharat Mobility Limited (India).
Acquirer details: Aurora Bharat Mobility Limited, C I N: L 2 9 3 0 8 K A 2 0 2 1 P L C 0 7 9 1 2 3; listed on NSE and BSE (symbol: NVBM, for illustration only).
Primary contact: Ms. Saanvi Rao, Company Secretary, saanvi.rao@aurorabharat.example.in, tel: +91-90000-88888; website: https://investors.aurora.example.in.
Target details: Nimbus Quantum Logistics Private Limited (CIN: U60232MH2018PTC441221; GSTIN: 27AAQPL3456P1Z9), registered office at Plot 14, Orbit Enclave, MIDC Phase 4, Aurangabad 431999, Maharashtra.
Consideration: INR 420 crore (75% cash, 25% share swap), subject to completion accounts under Ind AS 103; any equity issuance will comply with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
UPSI handling: Unpublished price sensitive information will be shared only post-NDA as per SEBI (PIT) Regulations, with trading window closure and insider list maintenance; this sentence is not MNPI.
Data room: https://dataroom.aurora.example.in/deal?pid=PAN%3DQZTPA1234F&gst=29QZTPA1234F1Z0 (URL contains masked identifiers for diligence).
KYC/PII for signatories: P A N: Q Z T P A 1 2 3 4 F; Aadhaar: 1234 5678 9012 (sample with invalid checksum); Passport (India): Z1234567; do not email scanned cards without redaction.
Escrow and settlement: Fictional India Commerce Bank, IFSC FICB0001234, A/c No. 004201876543, UPI: aurora.escrow@ficb; beneficiary name must match board resolution.
Acquirer tax profile: GSTIN (Karnataka) 29QZTPA1234F1Z0 (illustrative, checksum not valid); corporate address: TechVista Park, Tower C, Sector 98, New Noida 209999, Uttar Pradesh.
Data protection: Each Party shall issue a DPDP Act-compliant notice and obtain consent where required; no processing of personal data of individuals under 18 without verifiable guardian consent; appoint a Grievance Officer.
Placeholders not to be treated as identifiers: Compliance Officer: __________; PAN (to be filled): ________; phone (helpline): 1800-000-1122; role-only names like “Authorised Signatory” are not persons.
Covenants: No forward dealing or tipper–tippee sharing; no auto-forwarding of emails; chinese wall to be maintained; negative MAC: normal product roadmap changes shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
Conditions precedent and approvals: CCI notification if thresholds met, RBI approval for any non-resident remittance, SEBI observation letter if required, NSE/BSE intimation, target board and shareholder approvals.
Signatories: Mr. Arvind Menon, Director, arvind.menon@nimbusql.example.in; For Acquirer — Authorised Signatory; pending board sign-off, do kickoff after greenlight; drawdown schedule attached in Annexure A.
